items.title: 2026 PGA Championship picks, odds: Rory McIlroy, Jon Rahm among nine who can catch leader Alex Smalley
items.summary: Only two times since 2000 has the final pairing at the PGA Championship consisted of players without a PGA Tour win
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Rangers set for 'summer of change' as Cavenagh backs Rohl
items.summary: Rangers chairman Andrew Cavenagh backs manager Danny Rohl and says a "summer of substantial change" will happen at Ibrox after the failings of this season.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
